assertions.name: corpus contains at least 500 cases
mp3: format family represented
flac: format family represented
m4a: format family represented
corpus feature: duplicates
corpus feature: multiple-artwork
corpus feature: large-artwork
corpus feature: long-text
corpus feature: unicode
corpus feature: mislabeled
corpus feature: malformed-or-truncated
manifest generation is deterministic
independent structural audio-payload hashes reproduce
adversarial fixtures are structurally rejected
mp3: production inspect accepts every valid corpus fixture
mp3: canonical editable projection matches golden metadata
mp3: production no-op patch is byte-identical
mp3: production edit preserves independent audio hash
mp3: production rejects every adversarial corpus fixture
flac: production inspect accepts every valid corpus fixture
flac: canonical editable projection matches golden metadata
flac: production no-op patch is byte-identical
flac: production edit preserves independent audio hash
flac: production rejects every adversarial corpus fixture
m4a: production inspect accepts every valid corpus fixture
m4a: canonical editable projection matches golden metadata
m4a: production no-op patch is byte-identical
m4a: production edit preserves independent audio hash
m4a: production rejects every adversarial corpus fixture
mp3: edit preserves audio essence, opaque metadata, and extra artwork
flac: edit preserves audio essence, opaque metadata, and extra artwork
m4a: edit preserves audio essence, opaque metadata, and extra artwork
mp3: mutation runner completed without harness crashes
flac: mutation runner completed without harness crashes
m4a: mutation runner completed without harness crashes
